programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: When Jessica is charged with the murder of her best friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her spouse to clear her name. She soon untangles a deadly web of lust and deceit that leads directly to those she trusts the most.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Whispers of a Secret Life
programme.desc: Jessica becomes alarmed when her best friend, Amanda, starts behaving erratically after an accident. When Amanda's reckless behavior threatens Jessica's family, she digs deep into her past and realizes she may not know her best friend at all.

programme.title: I'm Your Biggest Fan
programme.desc: An obsessive fan kidnaps a former child star to live out the fantasy of having her character as a best friend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Whispers of a Secret Life
programme.desc: Jessica becomes alarmed when her best friend, Amanda, starts behaving erratically after an accident. When Amanda's reckless behavior threatens Jessica's family, she digs deep into her past and realizes she may not know her best friend at all.

programme.desc: An obsessive fan kidnaps a former child star to live out the fantasy of having her character as a best friend.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: NECTAR TRI-PILLOW -Cooler, Comfy, Better Sleep! Buy One Get One FREE!
programme.desc: Discover the Nectar Tri-Comfort Cooling Pillow for the ultimate sleep experience! Adjustable to three firmness levels to provide customized support and cooling all night long. Order NOW to get a second pillow FREE, plus a 30-night home trial!

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, a reporter (Chloë Sevigny) becomes entangled in a mystery involving separated Siamese twins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Married to a Murderer
programme.desc: Emma thinks she has found her soul mate, until her husband's twin brother returns and quickly becomes a danger to everyone around him.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Evil Twin
programme.desc: A woman escapes from an abusive relationship by moving back to her hometown, only to discover she has a long-lost twin sister who may be a murderer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Vanished: Searching for My Sister
programme.desc: Jada gets pulled into a world of drugs and deceit in order to learn the shocking truth about what really happened to her missing sister, Kayla.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Framed by My Sister
programme.desc: Twins Reina and Alex find their lives upended by their mysterious triplet Trinity, who was separated from them at birth and who has devised a plan to frame one for murder and assume the identity of the other.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Lies My Sister Told Me
programme.desc: When Tracy forcibly swaps lives with her identical twin sister, she discovers the nightmarish world Jennifer truly lives in.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Missing Twin
programme.desc: Jenny is haunted by the feeling that the twin daughter she lost at birth is still alive, but her husband fears it's becoming an obsession. Her relentless pursuit of the truth soon throws her into a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: My Mother Looked Just Like You
programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Sharon's identical twin sister vanished. Her whole life soon gets upended when she meets a young woman who claims to be her sister's daughter.

programme.title: The Woman With My Face
programme.desc: When Anya moves to a new town and gets mistaken for a woman named Sarah, she soon discovers she has an identical twin sister who was separated at birth. However, when Anya decides to investigate why, she's met with a mysterious threat.

programme.title: My Mother Looked Just Like You
programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Sharon's identical twin sister vanished. Her whole life soon gets upended when she meets a young woman who claims to be her sister's daughter.

programme.desc: When Anya moves to a new town and gets mistaken for a woman named Sarah, she soon discovers she has an identical twin sister who was separated at birth. However, when Anya decides to investigate why, she's met with a mysterious threat.

programme.title: Matters of Life & Dating
programme.desc: A woman (Ricki Lake) tries to maintain her confidence when she returns to the dating scene after having a mastectomy.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: A Date With Danger
programme.desc: A single mom is looking for a fresh start in a new town when she befriends a boutique owner. After her new friend goes missing, she begins to suspect her neighbor of the crime.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: A charming but devious man (Aiden Turner) conspires to bilk a wealthy veterinarian (Ashley Scott) of her money.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: He's Not Worth Dying For
programme.desc: When Isla and Grace discover that Jake was cheating on them, the girls turn on each other in a jealous rivalry and use their arsenal of social media platforms to badmouth and attack one another.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Wrong Blind Date
programme.desc: After splitting from her controlling husband, a single mother meets a seemingly perfect man who has a dark past and sinister intentions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention in his profile.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance, Will, of harassment and aggressive behavior. When one of the posters mysteriously disappears, she soon starts to wonder if the stories about Will are true.

programme.title: The Dating App Nightmare
programme.desc: Single mom Kate signs up for a dating app with her daughter, Sarah, turning it into a fun bonding moment. But when Sarah goes missing after a date, Kate must navigate the dangerous world they entered together to bring her home safely.

programme.title: The Night She Disappeared
programme.desc: When her daughter vanishes, a single mother becomes obsessed with a local urban legend about teens disappearing after a dangerous initiation ritual. As she starts to dig deeper, she soon finds herself in the crosshairs of a sinister killer.
